transcript: But if I could just flow, and that's what happens when I feel connected, I feel like I'm flowing and giving into, just letting the universe flow through me. and I feel all this love and just kindness and an inner acceptance of self but also an acceptance of the world and the feeling is so beautiful Oh it's that connected feeling that creates this warm feeling in my chest and it feels like everything beautiful is leaning into me. like plants, humans, animals, everything is leaning into me, and it's okay, And I lean into everything And it all becomes One cake, and I lean into everything, and it all becomes one inside of me, and in many ways it doesn't matter what shape I am, and even in that moment it's acknowledging that I am the tree, and I am the leaf, and I am the evolution, and the love, and the connectedness, I am a portal, and I can choose all of it by not resisting.
